TypedExtensionsWithAdditionalColumns Method

Overload List
  NameDescription
WithAdditionalColumnsT(T, String)
Configures the specified database columns to be loaded from the database, but not returned in the result.
WithAdditionalColumnsT(ICrudMethodT, ExpressionFuncT, Object)
Configures the specified database columns to be loaded from the database, but not returned in the result.
